• Format - Japanese Import
  • Genre - 3-D Fighting
  • Publisher - Bandai
  • Players - 1-8 Players





Dragonball isn't as good as Legends, but offers some kool features. Its a 3-D fighting mode. The bad thing about this game is that when you try to excecute a move it takes about a sec to actually take action. It also doesn't have a variety of moves just the basic punch, kick, fireball, and some combos, but thats it. I dont suggest this until you have Legends or Ultimate Battle but it still is good for a DBZ fan to have.

Must have a MOD chip installed or be using a Japanese PSX.

The original from Japan. Supports up to 8 players for fighting frenzy at it's best.
